CustomField.description: Days after Quote.Effective_Date__c that billing for this line item begins. Mirrors OpportunityLineItem.Billing_Start_Offset_Days__c via the Copy-OLI-to-QLI accelerator. 0 = bill from day one.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Offset (days) from quote effective date before this line bills.
CustomField.label: Billing Start Offset (Days)
